## Description

Please include a detailed summary of the changes and specify the issue resolved.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change resolving an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding features)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature requiring API change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style and naming conventions of this project.
- [ ] I have updated docstrings and types accordingly.
- [ ] I have added/modified unit tests to verify my changes.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally.
